key_insight: SciReasoner turns structural data into addressable tokens so one multimodal model can make accurate, interpretable predictions across proteins, molecules, and crystals under domain-specific scientific constraints.
engineering_relevance: For materials and molecular engineering, this suggests a practical path to models that not only predict structure-property outcomes better, but also expose evidence traces that support design decisions and verification.
method: Discretizes coordinates, topologies, and periodic connectivities into a unified structure-aware vocabulary.
Uses structural tokens as evidence units for native reasoning across biology, chemistry, and materials science.
Supports interpretable traces such as fragment-level disconnection and precursor verification in retrosynthesis.
evidence_signal: Across 86 benchmarks, SciReasoner reports state-of-the-art results on 67 tasks, including Gene Ontology Cellular Component Fmax improving from 0.42 to 0.55 for low-homology and orphan-like proteins, and single-step retrosynthesis accuracy rising from 0.63 to 0.72.
watch_item: Because the approach relies on discretizing structural information into tokens, performance and interpretability may depend on the chosen encoding resolution and how well it transfers to new structure types or edge-case geometries.
paper_title: Accurate, Interdisciplinary and Transparent Structure-property Understanding with Deep Native Structural Reasoning
